LEGAL

Important Disclosures

Transparency is central to our fiduciary commitment.

Advisory Services

Investment advisory services are offered through Capital Wealth. Michael Stevens is an Investment Adviser Representative (IAR) and adheres to the fiduciary standard of care.

Capital Wealth is a registered investment adviser. Registration does not imply any level of skill or training. The presence of this website shall not be directly or indirectly interpreted as a solicitation of investment advisory services to persons of another jurisdiction unless otherwise permitted by statute.

Fiduciary Standard

As fiduciary advisors, we are legally obligated to act in our clients' best interests at all times. This means we provide objective advice free from conflicts of interest. We do not receive commissions from the sale of financial products.

Investment Risks

Investing involves risk, including the potential loss of principal. Past performance is not indicative of future results. No investment strategy can guarantee a profit or protect against loss in periods of declining values.

Diversification and asset allocation do not ensure a profit or protect against a loss. There is no guarantee that any particular asset allocation or mix of funds will meet your investment objectives or provide you with a given level of income.

Tax & Legal Information

Capital Wealth does not provide tax or legal advice. The tax-related information presented on this website is for general informational purposes only. Clients should consult with their qualified tax and legal professionals regarding their specific situation.

Any tax-related information or strategies discussed are based on current tax laws, which are subject to change at any time.

Case Studies & Hypothetical Examples

Case studies and hypothetical examples presented on this website are for illustrative purposes only. They do not represent actual client results. Individual outcomes will vary based on each person's unique financial situation, goals, and risk tolerance.

The scenarios are not a guarantee of future results and should not be relied upon as a promise of specific outcomes.

Third-Party Content

This website may contain links to third-party websites or reference third-party content. These are provided as a convenience and do not imply endorsement. Capital Wealth is not responsible for the accuracy or content of third-party sources.

Licensing

Michael Stevens holds a Series 66 securities license and California insurance license #0G96805. Licensing and registration details are available upon request or through applicable regulatory bodies.

Privacy Policy

Capital Wealth is committed to protecting your personal information. We do not sell, share, or distribute your personal information to third parties except as required by law or as necessary to provide our services.

Information collected through our website forms is used solely for the purpose of responding to your inquiry and providing financial advisory services.

Contact Information

If you have questions about these disclosures or our services, please contact us:

Lehi, UT 84043
Phone: 801.210.2800
Email: info@capitalwealth.com
